scripts.build:go: npm run build && rm -rf cmd/masterdatamate/dist && cp -R dist cmd/masterdatamate/dist && mkdir -p .cache/go-build dist-native && GOCACHE=$PWD/.cache/go-build go build -mod=mod -o dist-native/masterdatamate ./cmd/masterdatamate
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && mkdir -p .cache/go-build build/bin && GOCACHE=$PWD/.cache/go-build go build -mod=mod -o build/bin/MasterDataMate .
scripts.package:desktop:mac: npm run build:desktop && rm -rf build/MasterDataMate.app && mkdir -p build/MasterDataMate.app/Contents/MacOS build/MasterDataMate.app/Contents/Resources && cp build/bin/MasterDataMate build/MasterDataMate.app/Contents/MacOS/MasterDataMate && cp build/darwin/Info.plist build/MasterDataMate.app/Contents/Info.plist
